client_audio_pipeline_t(3) Library Functions Manual client_audio_pipeline_t(3)

NAME

client_audio_pipeline_t - Client audio pipeline state.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/audio/client_pipeline.h>

Data Fields


client_audio_pipeline_flags_t flags
void * echo_canceller
SpeexPreprocessState * preprocess
JitterBuffer * jitter
uint32_t jitter_timestamp
int jitter_frame_span
OpusEncoder * encoder
OpusDecoder * decoder
compressor_t compressor
noise_gate_t noise_gate
noise_gate_t playback_noise_gate
highpass_filter_t highpass
lowpass_filter_t lowpass
client_audio_pipeline_config_t config
int frame_size
int16_t * work_i16
int16_t * echo_i16
float * work_float
bool initialized
int capture_fadein_remaining
void * debug_wav_aec3_in
void * debug_wav_aec3_out
void * aec3_render_buffer
void * aec3_capture_buffer

Detailed Description

Client audio pipeline state.

Owns all audio processing components and buffers. Created with client_audio_pipeline_create(), destroyed with _destroy().

Definition at line 229 of file client_pipeline.h.

Field Documentation

void* client_audio_pipeline_t::aec3_capture_buffer

Definition at line 291 of file client_pipeline.h.

Referenced by client_audio_pipeline_create(), client_audio_pipeline_destroy(), and client_audio_pipeline_process_duplex().

void* client_audio_pipeline_t::aec3_render_buffer

Persistent AudioBuffer instances for AEC3 (opaque C++ objects) Note: AudioBuffer has internal filterbank state that must persist across frames. Creating new buffers each frame causes discontinuities (static/buzzing).

Definition at line 290 of file client_pipeline.h.

Referenced by client_audio_pipeline_create(), client_audio_pipeline_destroy(), and client_audio_pipeline_process_duplex().
